title: Dunzo International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Dunzo International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Dunzo International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Indore-based team.

About Dunzo International Enterprises:
Dunzo International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo International Enterprises!
